name: Chocolate Cheesecake (1)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Prepare the graham cracker crust in a springform pan and refrigerate until needed.
3. Melt the chocolate over low heat, then add the rum. Set aside to cool.
4. Beat the cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually beat in the sugar, sour cream, and vanilla extract.
5. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
6. Place the bowl over hot water and stir until smooth.
7. Pour 1/4 of the batter into another bowl and set aside.
8. Mix some chocolate into the remaining batter. Stir gently until smooth.
9. Remove the springform pan from the refrigerator. Pour in the chocolate batter.
10. Gently pour the plain batter over the top of the chocolate batter, forming swirls with a fork. Some chocolate should show through.
11. Bake for 50 minutes. Cool to room temperature.
12. Remove the rim from the springform pan and refrigerate overnight.
